expectations.text: Output uses the worker handoff summary format (not the implementation or closeout format)
expectations.evidence: Title 'Worker Handoff — proj-42-w2'; structured as a worker-to-orchestrator handoff.

expectations.text: All 6 fields appear: Task (or Bead), Branch with Published+Commit, Implementation Outcome with integration target, Quality Gates, Risks/Gaps, Review Notes
expectations.evidence: Conceptual content is present but the labeled fields 'Implementation Outcome', 'Risks/Gaps', and 'Review Notes' are not used. Sections are titled Summary, Branch Info, What I Did, Quality Gates, Things to Watch in Integration, Other Issues.
Title and Summary reference 'bead proj-42-w2' explicitly.

expectations.text: Branch field names feature/proj-42-w2_staging-source-ref, marks Published as yes, includes commit SHA 7a3f9b1
expectations.evidence: Branch Info lists branch name, 'Published to remote: Yes', and 'Handoff commit SHA: 7a3f9b1'.

expectations.text: Quality Gates section reports concrete results (142/142 unit tests, 0 lint errors, typecheck passed) — not vague
expectations.evidence: 'Lint: 0 errors; Typecheck: passing; Unit tests: 142/142 passing'.

expectations.text: Review Notes call out the github.head_ref consideration the worker wants the orchestrator to verify
expectations.evidence: 'Things to Watch in Integration' section discusses github.head_ref behavior and asks the orchestrator to confirm parent-epic protections.

expectations.text: Output is concise (worker handoff is shorter than the user-facing implementation summary; no Behavioral Impact / File Reference Summary unless explicitly relevant)
expectations.evidence: No Behavioral Impact or File Reference Summary sections; output is concise.

expectations.text: Output does not falsely claim the branch was accepted, merged, or that closeout happened — handoff is pre-acceptance
expectations.evidence: Closes with 'Handing off to the orchestrator for integration review and acceptance' — explicitly pre-acceptance.

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No mention of the skill name.
